dashboard.label: PhishIQPlus - Performance
dashboard.description: Latency, throughput, and retry visibility for PhishIQPlus enrichment.

search.query: index=$phishiqplus_internal_index$ sourcetype=$phishiqplus_internal_sourcetype$ event_type=run_summary | timechart span=15m avg(duration_ms) as avg_ms p95(duration_ms) as p95_ms

index=$phishiqplus_internal_index$ sourcetype=$phishiqplus_internal_sourcetype$ event_type=run_summary | timechart span=15m sum(urls_total) as urls_total sum(urls_success) as urls_success sum(urls_failed) as urls_failed

index=$phishiqplus_internal_index$ sourcetype=$phishiqplus_internal_sourcetype$ event_type=run_summary | timechart span=15m sum(client_metrics.attempts) as attempts sum(client_metrics.retries) as retries

index=$phishiqplus_internal_index$ sourcetype=$phishiqplus_internal_sourcetype$ event_type=run_summary | eval err=coalesce(client_metrics.last_error,"none") | stats count by err | sort - count | head 10
